prompt: A depth map of a sci-fi corridor, where the foreground floor and walls are bright, fading into near-black as the corridor recedes.
prompt_refined: Generate a grayscale depth map image of a sci-fi corridor. The foreground elements, including the floor and walls closest to the viewer, should appear in bright white. This brightness should smoothly transition, progressively darkening to near-black as the corridor extends into the distance.
